name: Artichoke and Roasted Red Pepper Frittata
recipeIngredient: 10 Ounces Frozen Artichoke Hearts, thawed and quartered
2 Large Red Bell Peppers, roasted, seeded, and chopped
2 Tablespoons Minced Fresh Herbs (such as parsley or basil)
Salt And Freshly Ground Pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a 9 or 10-inch non-stick oven-proof skillet, sauté onions in butter until softened and just beginning to color.
3. Add artichoke hearts and continue cooking for a minute or two longer.
4. Stir in roasted red peppers, herbs, eggs, feta cheese, salt, and pepper.
5. Cook the mixture until the eggs are just set.
6. Gently lift the frittata and tilt the skillet to evenly distribute any uncooked eggs.
7. Transfer the skillet to a preheated oven at 375°F (or under a broiler about 3 inches from the heat).
8. Continue cooking until the top is set.
9. Use a spatula to loosen the frittata and invert it onto a serving plate.
10. Serve warm or at room temperature.
Yield: 4-6 servings as an appetizer
